title: Tapping for the Parent Loss
subtitle: A five-minute tapping practice for the loss of a parent, in the early months and the later years
excerpt: A five-minute tapping practice for the loss of a parent. The loss is a different shape at different times: the early shock, the first year of holidays, the later years of small reminders. The script meets the grief where it is on the day.
sourceNotes: Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.

practice.whenToUse: Use when the parent-grief is loud: the early months, a birthday, a holiday, or any day when the missing has caught you off guard.

content.text: A five-minute tapping practice for the loss of a parent. The script holds the missing for the body that is carrying it today.
New to tapping? Read
how EFT tapping works
first.
The practice
Karate chop (repeat x3)
Even though my parent has died and I am living without them, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though some days the missing is the loudest thing in the room, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Even though the grief is not on a timetable, I deeply and completely accept myself.
Tapping round
**Eyebrow:** My parent has died.
**Side of eye:** I am missing them today.
**Under eye:** Some days the missing is sharp.
**Under nose:** Some days I forget they are gone for a minute, and then I remember.
**Chin:** I want to ring them.
**Collarbone:** They are not on the other end of the line.
**Under arm:** This grief is heavy.
**Top of head:** I am allowed to carry it for the rest of my life.
Reframe to positive
**Eyebrow:** My parent has died, and I am still here.
**Side of eye:** I can let myself miss them today.
**Under eye:** The sharp days come and go.
**Under nose:** The forgetting is part of the loving.
**Chin:** I can talk to them in my head.
**Collarbone:** They are inside the shape of who I am now.
**Under arm:** The love does not end with the person.
**Top of head:** I carry them with me.
Tap the round three times. Then tap the reframe three times.
Where this practice comes from
Original to homemade.education. The tapping shape is EFT. EFT was made by Gary Craig in the mid-1990s.
